would be the caldera sword one of the most muse mountains in the history of the tour before the vallejo assay and then the millions of hairpins it seems the never-ending climb the cold du porte and a first slopes of the final climb gordon the bigger heavier rider perez the man who would leave him behind they'd already been a few surprising riders drop out the back of the gc group by the time that enrique mass also lost contact guillaume mata would lose positions in the gc2 and after rafael miker finished his job tadepogacha would launch his own first attack with eight point four kilometers still to go vince gore immediately able to follow uran would be there too as would o'connor calapas came across but all that wouldn't last too long yet more attacks yet more moves bogatyard desperate to finish the job that his team had begun vignego and karapaz will bail to find him still over seven kilometers to go at this point as uran was getting some help alongside the drop toe connor igita doing his best for his compatriot and teammate karapas would sit on the back as vingo and pogachar would attack carapaz launching his own move at just under one and a half kilometers to go bulgacho would catch him vinegar would show his first sign of weakness but after working himself back on it was all together again with 200 meters to the line a real ding dong battle was ended though the man who's reigned supreme at this tour would grab yet another pyrenean stage win the young slovenian had already won in this mountain range at the welton grand tour debut two years before last year having won the tour won a stage just down the road in la hans this time and high up at 2 200 meters the slovenian star the defending champion will take another stage win his second of this year's race after the time trial had a yellow jersey lead extended gordu would be next to come in then o'connor with oran following closely behind this is how it shook up in the final top 10 on the day pogachar winning after five hours three minutes and 31 seconds of very very tough competition ringo second canapas third bonus second as well so an extension to the lead in the general classification for the man who looks like he's almost finished the job five minutes 39 now over jonas vingo is the lead for today pogaccha karapaz is up under the podium at 5 43. odan loses time and is at 7 17 o'connor's fifth at 7 34. the final mountain stage of this year's tour de france will take place on stage 18 just under 130 kilometers its climb followed by climb and two all category beasts to finish off the mighty tormally followed by the finish at luz aldida it's been kind of spanish riders down the years but it's all different nowadays not too predictable a bit like the weather in the pyrenees the tour de france rumbles on that gacha has a hand on the jersey but we're still not done yet four days to paris you
